---
name: Spike
about: A time-boxed investigation into a question blocking a story or decision
title: ""
labels: spike
---

## Question

<!-- State precisely what is unknown. It must be unambiguous, when the spike concludes,
     whether the question has been answered. -->

## Motivation / what is blocked

<!-- Which story, ADR, architectural decision, or task cannot proceed until this is
     answered? A spike without a dependency is a spike without urgency. -->

## Time-box

<!-- Initial allocation, and the condition under which an extension is appropriate. -->

## Approach

<!-- What to try, compare, or read. -->

## Determined output

<!-- The form the answer will take. This must be decided before the spike opens;
     "TBD" or "depends on what we find" means it is not ready. -->

## Result

<!-- Populated at the end of the spike: findings, and where any determined output
     (architecture document or ADR) was saved. -->
